ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in USD */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie in USD */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* A short tagline or slogan for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group making the rating */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group making the rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating scale used for the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was made */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review accompanying the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_rating_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_scale_id") REFERENCES rating_scales ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating distribution */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group making the rating */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group making the rating */,
  "rating_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating scale used for the distribution */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of users who gave this rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_distributions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_distributions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_distributions_rating_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_scale_id") REFERENCES rating_scales ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_distributions_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating scale */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the rating scale */,
  "min_rating" REAL /* Minimum rating for the scale */,
  "max_rating" REAL /* Maximum rating for the scale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the group */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group that the user is a member of */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the age group */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group that the user is a member of */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_group_memberships_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating scale used for the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was made */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review accompanying the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_rating_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_scale_id") REFERENCES rating_scales ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie genre */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that belongs to this genre */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was added to the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
